/usr/bin/c++ -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -I/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk/usr/include/c++/v1 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_rlefile2.dir/test_rlefile2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_rlefile2.dir/BaseFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_rlefile2.dir/myString.cpp.o -o test_rlefile2
